subtitle.en: A complete step-by-step walkthrough — from birth data to finished chart — using a worked example
subtitle.hi: एक सम्पूर्ण चरणबद्ध मार्गदर्शिका — जन्म विवरण से पूर्ण कुण्डली तक — एक उदाहरण के साथ

overviewText.en: A Kundali (Janam Patri / birth chart) is a map of the sky at the exact moment and place of your birth. It captures which zodiac signs and planets occupied which houses, forming a unique cosmic fingerprint. Every element — the rising sign (Lagna), the nine Grahas, the 12 Bhavas, the Dashas — flows from three simple inputs: date, time, and place of birth. This page walks through every step of how we turn those three inputs into a complete chart.
overviewText.hi: कुण्डली (जन्म पत्री) आपके जन्म के ठीक उस क्षण और स्थान पर आकाश का नक्शा है। यह दर्शाती है कि कौन सी राशियाँ और ग्रह किन भावों में थे। प्रत्येक तत्व — लग्न, नौ ग्रह, 12 भाव, दशाएँ — तीन सरल आदानों से उत्पन्न होते हैं: जन्म तिथि, समय और स्थान। यह पृष्ठ प्रत्येक चरण का मार्गदर्शन करता है।
overviewText.sa: कुण्डली जन्मक्षणे स्थाने च आकाशस्य मानचित्रम्। सर्वं तत्त्वं — लग्नं, नवग्रहाः, द्वादशभावाः — त्रिभिः आदानैः जायते: जन्मतिथिः, समयः, स्थानं च।

s1Text.en: Every Kundali begins with exactly three pieces of information. Each determines a different aspect of the chart:
s1Text.hi: प्रत्येक कुण्डली ठीक तीन सूचनाओं से शुरू होती है। प्रत्येक कुण्डली के एक भिन्न पहलू को निर्धारित करती है:

s1Date.en: Date of Birth — determines where the Sun and planets are in the zodiac. The Sun moves ~1° per day, so even one day changes your chart.
s1Date.hi: जन्म तिथि — सूर्य और ग्रह राशिचक्र में कहाँ हैं यह निर्धारित करती है। सूर्य प्रतिदिन ~1° चलता है।
s1Date.sa: जन्मतिथिः — सूर्यः ग्रहाः च राशिचक्रे कुत्र सन्ति इति निर्धारयति।
s1Date.ta: Date of Birth — determines where the Sun and planets are in the zodiac. The Sun moves ~1° per day, so even one day changes your chart.

s1Date.mai: Date of Birth — determines where the Sun and planets are in the zodiac. The Sun moves ~1° per day, so even one day changes your chart.

s1Time.en: Time of Birth — determines the Lagna (ascendant). The rising sign changes every ~2 hours, so accuracy to the minute matters.
s1Time.hi: जन्म समय — लग्न (उदय राशि) निर्धारित करता है। उदय राशि हर ~2 घण्टे बदलती है, इसलिए मिनट तक की सटीकता महत्वपूर्ण है।
s1Time.sa: जन्मसमयः — लग्नं निर्धारयति। उदयराशिः प्रत्येकं ~2 होरासु परिवर्तते।
s1Time.ta: Time of Birth — determines the Lagna (ascendant). The rising sign changes every ~2 hours, so accuracy to the minute matters.
s1Time.te: Time of Birth — determines the Lagna (ascendant). The rising sign changes every ~2 hours, so accuracy to the minute matters.
s1Time.bn: Time of Birth — determines the Lagna (ascendant). The rising sign changes every ~2 hours, so accuracy to the minute matters.

s1Time.mai: Time of Birth — determines the Lagna (ascendant). The rising sign changes every ~2 hours, so accuracy to the minute matters.

s1Place.en: Place of Birth — provides the geographic latitude and longitude. Latitude affects which sign rises, and longitude converts clock time to the exact local solar time.
s1Place.hi: जन्म स्थान — भौगोलिक अक्षांश और देशान्तर प्रदान करता है। अक्षांश प्रभावित करता है कौन सी राशि उदित होती है।
s1Place.sa: जन्मस्थानम् — भौगोलिकं अक्षांशं देशान्तरं च ददाति।
s1Place.ta: Place of Birth — provides the geographic latitude and longitude. Latitude affects which sign rises, and longitude converts clock time to the exact local solar time.

s1Place.bn: Place of Birth — provides the geographic latitude and longitude. Latitude affects which sign rises, and longitude converts clock time to the exact local solar time.

s2Text.en: Astronomical calculations require Universal Time (UT), not local clock time. We also need the Julian Day Number — a continuous day count used by astronomers since 4713 BCE.
s2Text.hi: खगोलीय गणनाओं के लिए सार्वभौमिक समय (UT) आवश्यक है, स्थानीय घड़ी का समय नहीं। हमें जूलियन दिन संख्या भी चाहिए।
s2Text.ta: Astronomical calculations require Universal Time (UT), not local clock time. We also need the Julian Day Number — a continuous day count used by astronomers since 4713 BCE.
s2Text.te: Astronomical calculations require Universal Time (UT), not local clock time. We also need the Julian Day Number — a continuous day count used by astronomers since 4713 BCE.
s2Text.bn: Astronomical calculations require Universal Time (UT), not local clock time. We also need the Julian Day Number — a continuous day count used by astronomers since 4713 BCE.

s2Text.mr: Astronomical calculations require Universal Time (UT), not local clock time. We also need the Julian Day Number — a continuous day count used by astronomers since 4713 BCE.
s2Text.gu: Astronomical calculations require Universal Time (UT), not local clock time. We also need the Julian Day Number — a continuous day count used by astronomers since 4713 BCE.
s2Text.mai: Astronomical calculations require Universal Time (UT), not local clock time. We also need the Julian Day Number — a continuous day count used by astronomers since 4713 BCE.

s3Text.en: Sidereal time measures the Earth's rotation relative to the stars (not the Sun). It tells us which part of the zodiac is directly overhead right now. The LST at your birth location and time is the key to finding your Lagna.
s3Text.hi: नाक्षत्रिक समय पृथ्वी के घूर्णन को तारों के सापेक्ष मापता है। यह बताता है कि राशिचक्र का कौन सा भाग अभी ठीक ऊपर है। आपके जन्म स्थान और समय पर LST लग्न ज्ञात करने की कुंजी है।
s3Text.sa: नाक्षत्रिकसमयः पृथिव्याः भ्रमणं ताराणां सापेक्षं मापयति।
s3Text.ta: Sidereal time measures the Earth's rotation relative to the stars (not the Sun). It tells us which part of the zodiac is directly overhead right now. The LST at your birth location and time is the key to finding your Lagna.
s3Text.te: Sidereal time measures the Earth's rotation relative to the stars (not the Sun). It tells us which part of the zodiac is directly overhead right now. The LST at your birth location and time is the key to finding your Lagna.
s3Text.bn: Sidereal time measures the Earth's rotation relative to the stars (not the Sun). It tells us which part of the zodiac is directly overhead right now. The LST at your birth location and time is the key to finding your Lagna.

s4Text.en: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.
s4Text.hi: लग्न (उदय राशि) जन्म के क्षण पूर्वी क्षितिज पर उदित होने वाली राशि है। यह प्रथम भाव बन जाती है और सम्पूर्ण कुण्डली की नींव रखती है।
s4Text.sa: लग्नं जन्मक्षणे पूर्वक्षितिजे उदयमाना राशिः। एषा प्रथमभावः भवति।
s4Text.ta: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.
s4Text.te: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.
s4Text.bn: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.
s4Text.kn: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.
s4Text.mr: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.
s4Text.gu: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.
s4Text.mai: The Lagna (ascendant) is the zodiac sign rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth. It becomes the 1st house and anchors the entire chart.

s5Text.en: Our astronomical algorithms (Meeus) give tropical longitudes — positions relative to the spring equinox. But Vedic astrology uses sidereal longitudes — positions relative to the fixed stars. The difference is the Ayanamsha, currently ~24°.
s5Text.hi: हमारे खगोलीय एल्गोरिथ्म उष्णकटिबन्धीय देशान्तर देते हैं। लेकिन वैदिक ज्योतिष नाक्षत्रिक देशान्तर का उपयोग करता है। अन्तर अयनांश है, वर्तमान में ~24°।
s5Text.sa: अस्माकं खगोलीयगणितानि उष्णकटिबन्धीयदेशान्तरं ददति। वैदिकज्योतिषं नाक्षत्रिकदेशान्तरं प्रयुङ्क्ते। भेदः अयनांशः, इदानीं ~24°।
s5Text.ta: Our astronomical algorithms (Meeus) give tropical longitudes — positions relative to the spring equinox. But Vedic astrology uses sidereal longitudes — positions relative to the fixed stars. The difference is the Ayanamsha, currently ~24°.
s5Text.te: Our astronomical algorithms (Meeus) give tropical longitudes — positions relative to the spring equinox. But Vedic astrology uses sidereal longitudes — positions relative to the fixed stars. The difference is the Ayanamsha, currently ~24°.

s6Text.en: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.
s6Text.hi: जूलियन दिन का उपयोग करके, हम नौ ग्रहों में से प्रत्येक का नाक्षत्रिक देशान्तर गणना करते हैं।
s6Text.sa: जूलियनदिनं प्रयुज्य, वयं नवग्रहाणां प्रत्येकस्य नाक्षत्रिकदेशान्तरं गणयामः।
s6Text.ta: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.
s6Text.te: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.
s6Text.bn: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.
s6Text.kn: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.
s6Text.mr: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.
s6Text.gu: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.
s6Text.mai: Using the Julian Day, we calculate the sidereal longitude of each of the nine Grahas.

s7Title.hi: चरण 7: ग्रहों को भावों में रखना

s7Text.en: In the Whole-Sign house system (standard Vedic), the Lagna's Rashi becomes the entire 1st house. The next Rashi becomes the 2nd house, and so on.
s7Text.hi: पूर्ण-राशि भाव पद्धति में, लग्न की राशि सम्पूर्ण प्रथम भाव बन जाती है। अगली राशि द्वितीय भाव बनती है, इत्यादि।
s7Text.sa: पूर्णराशिभावपद्धत्यां, लग्नस्य राशिः सकला प्रथमभावः भवति।
s7Text.ta: In the Whole-Sign house system (standard Vedic), the Lagna's Rashi becomes the entire 1st house. The next Rashi becomes the 2nd house, and so on.
s7Text.te: In the Whole-Sign house system (standard Vedic), the Lagna's Rashi becomes the entire 1st house. The next Rashi becomes the 2nd house, and so on.
s7Text.bn: In the Whole-Sign house system (standard Vedic), the Lagna's Rashi becomes the entire 1st house. The next Rashi becomes the 2nd house, and so on.
s7Text.kn: In the Whole-Sign house system (standard Vedic), the Lagna's Rashi becomes the entire 1st house. The next Rashi becomes the 2nd house, and so on.
s7Text.mr: In the Whole-Sign house system (standard Vedic), the Lagna's Rashi becomes the entire 1st house. The next Rashi becomes the 2nd house, and so on.

s7Text.mai: In the Whole-Sign house system (standard Vedic), the Lagna's Rashi becomes the entire 1st house. The next Rashi becomes the 2nd house, and so on.

s8Text.en: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.
s8Text.hi: उत्तर भारतीय कुण्डली एक हीरे के आकार की जाली है जहाँ भाव स्थितियाँ स्थिर हैं — भाव 1 सदा शीर्ष पर है।
s8Text.ta: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.
s8Text.te: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.
s8Text.bn: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.
s8Text.kn: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.
s8Text.mr: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.
s8Text.gu: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.
s8Text.mai: The North Indian chart is a diamond grid where house positions are fixed — House 1 is always at the top.

s9Text.en: Not all planet placements are equal. Each Graha has signs where it is strongest (Uccha/exalted), weakest (Neecha/debilitated), or comfortable (Swa Rashi/own sign).
s9Text.hi: सभी ग्रह स्थितियाँ समान नहीं हैं। प्रत्येक ग्रह की ऐसी राशियाँ हैं जहाँ वह सबसे शक्तिशाली (उच्च), सबसे कमज़ोर (नीच), या सहज (स्वराशि) होता है।
s9Text.sa: सर्वाणि ग्रहस्थानानि न समानि। प्रत्येकस्य ग्रहस्य उच्चं, नीचं, स्वराशिः च अस्ति।
s9Text.ta: Not all planet placements are equal. Each Graha has signs where it is strongest (Uccha/exalted), weakest (Neecha/debilitated), or comfortable (Swa Rashi/own sign).
s9Text.te: Not all planet placements are equal. Each Graha has signs where it is strongest (Uccha/exalted), weakest (Neecha/debilitated), or comfortable (Swa Rashi/own sign).
s9Text.bn: Not all planet placements are equal. Each Graha has signs where it is strongest (Uccha/exalted), weakest (Neecha/debilitated), or comfortable (Swa Rashi/own sign).

s9Text.mai: Not all planet placements are equal. Each Graha has signs where it is strongest (Uccha/exalted), weakest (Neecha/debilitated), or comfortable (Swa Rashi/own sign).

s10Text.en: Every planet casts Drishti (aspect) on other houses. All planets have a 7th-house aspect (opposite). Mars additionally aspects the 4th and 8th; Jupiter the 5th and 9th; Saturn the 3rd and 10th.
s10Text.hi: प्रत्येक ग्रह अन्य भावों पर दृष्टि डालता है। सभी ग्रहों की 7वें भाव पर दृष्टि होती है। मंगल की 4 और 8 पर, गुरु की 5 और 9 पर, शनि की 3 और 10 पर अतिरिक्त दृष्टि होती है।
s10Text.sa: प्रत्येकः ग्रहः अन्यभावेषु दृष्टिं क्षिपति। सर्वग्रहाणां 7 भावे दृष्टिः। मङ्गलस्य 4, 8; गुरोः 5, 9; शनेः 3, 10 अतिरिक्तदृष्टिः।
s10Text.ta: Every planet casts Drishti (aspect) on other houses. All planets have a 7th-house aspect (opposite). Mars additionally aspects the 4th and 8th; Jupiter the 5th and 9th; Saturn the 3rd and 10th.
s10Text.te: Every planet casts Drishti (aspect) on other houses. All planets have a 7th-house aspect (opposite). Mars additionally aspects the 4th and 8th; Jupiter the 5th and 9th; Saturn the 3rd and 10th.

s10Text.mai: Every planet casts Drishti (aspect) on other houses. All planets have a 7th-house aspect (opposite). Mars additionally aspects the 4th and 8th; Jupiter the 5th and 9th; Saturn the 3rd and 10th.

s11Text.en: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.
s11Text.hi: विंशोत्तरी दशा प्रणाली जन्म के समय चन्द्र के नक्षत्र के आधार पर जीवन को ग्रह अवधियों में विभाजित करती है।
s11Text.sa: विंशोत्तरीदशापद्धतिः जन्मसमये चन्द्रनक्षत्रस्य आधारेण जीवनं ग्रहकालखण्डेषु विभजति।
s11Text.ta: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.
s11Text.te: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.
s11Text.bn: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.
s11Text.kn: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.
s11Text.mr: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.
s11Text.gu: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.
s11Text.mai: The Vimshottari Dasha system divides life into planetary periods based on the Moon's Nakshatra at birth.

s12Text.en: Yogas are special planetary combinations that indicate specific life patterns. Doshas are afflictions. Our engine checks for 11 yogas and 3 doshas automatically.
s12Text.hi: योग विशेष ग्रह संयोजन हैं जो विशिष्ट जीवन प्रतिमानों को इंगित करते हैं। दोष कठिनाइयाँ हैं। हमारा इंजन 11 योगों और 3 दोषों की स्वचालित जाँच करता है।
s12Text.sa: योगाः विशेषग्रहसंयोजनानि। दोषाः कठिनतायाः। अस्माकम् इञ्जिनं 11 योगान् 3 दोषान् च स्वचालितरूपेण परीक्षते।
s12Text.ta: Yogas are special planetary combinations that indicate specific life patterns. Doshas are afflictions. Our engine checks for 11 yogas and 3 doshas automatically.
s12Text.te: Yogas are special planetary combinations that indicate specific life patterns. Doshas are afflictions. Our engine checks for 11 yogas and 3 doshas automatically.
s12Text.bn: Yogas are special planetary combinations that indicate specific life patterns. Doshas are afflictions. Our engine checks for 11 yogas and 3 doshas automatically.

s12Text.mai: Yogas are special planetary combinations that indicate specific life patterns. Doshas are afflictions. Our engine checks for 11 yogas and 3 doshas automatically.

s13Text.en: A Kundali reading weaves all these layers: the Lagna reveals personality, planet placements show life areas, dignity shows strength, aspects create connections, lordships link houses, Dashas provide timing, and Yogas/Doshas flag special patterns.
s13Text.hi: कुण्डली पठन इन सभी परतों को बुनता है: लग्न व्यक्तित्व प्रकट करता है, ग्रह स्थितियाँ जीवन क्षेत्र दिखाती हैं, गरिमा बल दिखाती है, दृष्टि सम्बन्ध बनाती है, स्वामित्व भावों को जोड़ता है, दशाएँ समय प्रदान करती हैं, और योग/दोष विशेष प्रतिमान इंगित करते हैं।
s13Text.ta: A Kundali reading weaves all these layers: the Lagna reveals personality, planet placements show life areas, dignity shows strength, aspects create connections, lordships link houses, Dashas provide timing, and Yogas/Doshas flag special patterns.
